title: WINDING WATERS CLINIC - 211info
text: HEARTS FOR HEALTH CLINIC WINDING WATERS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, vaccinations, and mental health evaluations. Offers obstetric services, including prenatal care, labor and delivery, C-section, and postnatal care. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm; closed Thanksgiving and Christmas, all other holidays 9am-1pm Email (541) 426-4502 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4502 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Same day appointments may be available. FEES: Accepts Medicare, Medicaid, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans available to individuals with high deductibles or no insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Mental Health Evaluation Obstetrics/Gynecology Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD BOX HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
